历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 5246 → 6764 → 7828 → 10692 → 10843, showing a continuous and significant downward trend, with a cumulative decline of about 5597 positions over the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 10843; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 8 students in both 2021 and 2022, reduced to 6 in 2023, further reduced to 3 in 2024, and to 2 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly expands to 13 students, a 550% increase compared to 2025, greatly alleviating competition pressure.
3 .【School Level】211, Double First-Class; the main ranking of Soft Science has steadily risen from 93rd in 2021 to 81st in 2026, indicating a steady improvement in the school's comprehensive strength and recognition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2022, there was negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics and conduct, but the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative impact; Douyin popularity ranks 49th overall (relatively popular), indicating a certain level of social attention; Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), serving as the school's core strength; in 2026, Physics Category adds popular interdisciplinary majors such as Data Science and Big Data Technology, Actuarial Science, and Management Science and Engineering, broadening the options for science and engineering students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Data Science, Actuarial Science, and other majors fall under the computer/statistics category, with social popularity being relatively hot (Computer Science category in 2024, recommended); the number of Physics Category candidates in the province was 117,464 in 2021 → 192,096 in 2025 → estimated approximately 203,900 in 2026, showing continuous growth, an increase of about 6.1% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous and significant downward trend in historical rankings, the substantial enrollment expansion of 550% in 2026 (strong pressure to increase ranking numbers), the continuous increase in provincial candidates (pressure to increase ranking numbers), and the addition of popular majors attracting high-scoring students (pressure to decrease ranking numbers), taking into account the appeal of new popular majors like Data Science and Actuarial Science to high-scoring candidates, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 46425, with a range of 45925–46925.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Cognitive Science Big Data)
- Actuarial Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Management Science and Engineering (Outstanding Management Talent Program) (including Information Management and Information Systems, Big Data Management and Application)
- Business Administration (Outstanding Management Talent Program) (including Business Administration, Marketing, Financial Management, Public Relations).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Educational Technology (Digital Intelligence Education).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category significantly expands enrollment to 13 students, offering a rich selection of majors. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 45925–46925 can actively apply; those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<45925) can focus on sprinting for popular majors like Data Science and Actuarial Science; those with rankings close to the upper limit (>46925) are advised to use Educational Technology as a safety option.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the main ranking of Soft Science has steadily risen from 93rd in 2021 to 81st in 2026, with a steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; in 2022, there was a negative public opinion on teacher ethics (teacher harassment incident), but the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed (air conditioning fee dispute), with no major negative impact; Douyin popularity ranks 49th overall (relatively hot), with a certain level of social attention; Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), the core strength of the university, strongly attracting language-oriented candidates; the enrollment majors are mainly Business English and Chinese International Education, both within the first-level discipline of Foreign Language and Literature.
